_meta.source: Prime Self Sacred Texts & Canonical Philosophy
_meta.description: The Six Defenses — protective and restorative disciplines that shield, heal, and maintain the practitioner's integrity
_meta.note: Defenses are not paranoia — they are wisdom. The practitioner who cannot protect their energy cannot serve others. These disciplines maintain the vessel through which Prime work flows.

reflexology.essence: The body contains a map of itself. Press the map, heal the territory.
reflexology.description: Working with reflex points in the feet, hands, and ears that correspond to organs and systems throughout the body. This is both healing art and diagnostic tool. The reflexologist reads the body's story through its extremities.

principles.reflexMapping: Points on extremities correspond to distant organs
principles.energyFlow: Blockages in reflex points indicate blockages in corresponding areas

applications.selfCare: Daily foot massage for general maintenance
applications.diagnostic: Tender points reveal areas needing attention
applications.headRelief: Big toe points for head and brain

hdMapping.enhancement: Reflexology supports the physical vessel carrying your design

reflexology.primeApplication: Self-care practice to maintain physical vessel, grounding before readings, releasing tension after intense sessions

fiction: The Glass Bead Game by Hermann Hesse
The Bone People by Keri Hulme
nonFiction: Stories the Feet Can Tell by Eunice Ingham
The Complete Guide to Foot Reflexology by Kevin and Barbara Kunz
Reflexology: Art, Science & History by Christine Issel

acupressure.essence: Energy seeks to flow. Remove the block, and healing happens naturally.
acupressure.description: Working with energy meridians and pressure points derived from Traditional Chinese Medicine. Acupressure applies physical pressure to specific points to influence the flow of chi (life energy) through the body's energy pathways.

keyPoints.LI4_HeGu: Headaches, immunity, general pain (contraindicated in pregnancy)

hdMapping.enhancement: Acupressure can support consistent energy flow regardless of transit influences

acupressure.primeApplication: Quick self-regulation during readings, supporting clients with acute distress, maintaining energy flow during intensive work

fiction: The Woman Warrior by Maxine Hong Kingston
Snow Flower and the Secret Fan by Lisa See
Memoirs of a Geisha by Arthur Golden
nonFiction: Acupressure's Potent Points by Michael Reed Gach
The Web That Has No Weaver by Ted Kaptchuk
Between Heaven and Earth by Harriet Beinfield

chromotherapy.essence: Light is nutrition for the eyes and soul. The colors you surround yourself with feed or starve your spirit.
chromotherapy.description: Using color and light for healing and transformation. Different color frequencies affect the body, emotions, and consciousness in measurable ways. The chromotherapist works with the visible spectrum as a healing tool.

colorProperties.orange: Creativity, enthusiasm, social connection, sacral chakra
colorProperties.yellow: Mental clarity, confidence, digestion, solar plexus
colorProperties.green: Balance, healing, heart opening, heart chakra
colorProperties.indigo: Intuition, insight, third eye, brow chakra

forgeCorrespondences.chronos: Browns, blacks, deep earth tones (grounding in time)
forgeCorrespondences.eros: Reds, pinks, warm oranges (passion and heart)
forgeCorrespondences.lux: Golds, yellows, bright whites (clarity and revelation)
forgeCorrespondences.phoenix: Deep reds, blacks, transformation orange (death and rebirth)

support: Head centers (Ajna, Head) respond to light
hdMapping.enhancement: Color can support or buffer energy type needs

chromotherapy.primeApplication: Creating appropriate ambiance for readings, using color in visualization guidance, wearing colors that support your energy type

fiction: Girl with a Pearl Earring by Tracy Chevalier
The Color Purple by Alice Walker
nonFiction: Light: Medicine of the Future by Jacob Liberman
Healing with Color by Theo Gimbel

hypnosis.essence: The subconscious mind is not your enemy — it is your ally awaiting instructions.
hypnosis.description: Working with the subconscious mind through trance states. Hypnosis accesses the programming layer of consciousness where beliefs, habits, and automatic responses are stored. The hypnotist works with this level to install beneficial patterns and release limiting ones.

principles.suggestibility: Trance state increases receptivity to suggestion
principles.unconsciousProcessing: Subconscious mind processes suggestions without critical filter
principles.imagination: Subconscious responds to imagination as if real

applications.performanceEnhancement: Athletic and professional peak state access

support: Open centers as suggestible entry points
hdMapping.enhancement: Understanding your design helps identify which suggestions serve your authentic nature vs. conditioning

hypnosis.primeApplication: Self-hypnosis for maintaining reading clarity, guiding clients through visualization, accessing intuitive states for synthesis

fiction: The Manchurian Candidate by Richard Condon
nonFiction: My Voice Will Go with You by Milton Erickson

chakraWork.essence: The chakras are not mystical fantasy — they are experiential energy centers that can be felt, developed, and balanced.
chakraWork.description: Balancing and clearing the body's primary energy centers. The chakra system provides a map of human development, from survival (root) to transcendence (crown). Each chakra governs specific physical, emotional, and spiritual functions.
domains: Sound and color for chakra healing

support: Nine HD centers loosely map to seven chakras plus additional centers
hdMapping.enhancement: Chakra work can support open centers and balance defined centers

support: Each planet corresponds to chakra functions

chakraWork.primeApplication: Assessing client energy before readings, clearing and balancing after intensive sessions, maintaining personal energy hygiene

fiction: Autobiography of a Yogi by Paramahansa Yogananda
The Serpent Power by Sir John Woodroffe
Eastern Body Western Mind by Anodea Judith
nonFiction: Wheels of Life by Anodea Judith
Anatomy of the Spirit by Caroline Myss
The Subtle Body by Cyndi Dale

iwasOrisha.essence: You are not alone. The ancestors walk with you, and the divine forces respond to those who call correctly.
iwasOrisha.description: Working with ancestral spirit guides and divine forces from African diaspora traditions. The Orisha (Yoruba) and Lwa/Iwa (Vodou) are powerful archetypal forces that can be invoked for protection, guidance, and empowerment. This is the knowledge of working with spiritual allies.

principles.ashe: The vital force that makes things happen — similar to chi or prana
principles.ori: Personal divinity, the head, individual destiny
principles.reciprocity: Give to receive; relationship is exchange
principles.community: Spirituality is practiced in community, not isolation

orisha.elegba: Crossroads, communication, opens and closes doors
orisha.ochosi: Hunter, justice, focus, finding what is lost

respectfulPractice.initiation: Full practice requires initiation through legitimate lineage
respectfulPractice.study: Academic understanding is accessible; practice requires relationship
respectfulPractice.appropriation: Respect the tradition; do not claim what you have not earned
respectfulPractice.universalPrinciples: Ancestral veneration is universal; specific practices are cultural

support: Incarnation Cross relates to life purpose (ori)
hdMapping.enhancement: Understanding ancestral forces in your chart

iwasOrisha.primeApplication: Understanding ancestral patterns in readings, invoking appropriate spiritual support, creating protected space for deep work

fiction: The Famished Road by Ben Okri
Brown Girl in the Ring by Nalo Hopkinson
nonFiction: The Handbook of Yoruba Religious Concepts by Baba Ifa Karade
Of Water and the Spirit by Malidoma Somé
